title: Outpost in Morocco
writer: Charles Grayson, Paul de Sainte Colombe, Joseph N. Ermolieff
actors: George Raft, Marie Windsor, Akim Tamiroff
plot: After escorting an Emir's daughter to her father's stronghold, French Foreign Legion Captain Gerard's unit joins an isolated Moroccan outpost facing imminent attack by rebel Bedouin tribes.
